title: Berlin Public Transport - Quick Summary
items: One ticket works on **U-Bahn, S-Bahn, tram, and bus** — no separate tickets needed
Most tourists only need **Zone AB** (€4.00 single / €11.20 day ticket). Get **ABC** for BER Airport
**Always validate** paper tickets before boarding — the fine for unvalidated tickets is **€60**
U-Bahn = city center, S-Bahn = longer distances, Tram = East Berlin, Bus = fills the gaps
The **24-hour ticket** pays for itself after just 3 rides — best value for a full sightseeing day
